faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal services in Lynbrook for emergency situations. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. We serve all Lynbrook neighborhoods and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of hornet removal in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal pricing ($350-$550) depends on nest size, location accessibility, nest height, and hornet species. Ground-level nests are typically less expensive than those in tall trees or difficult-to-reach areas like second-story eaves. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Lynbrook?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and neighbors. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during treatment. We recommend keeping pets and children indoors during the removal process, and the area is typically safe within 2-3 hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee hornets won't return to my Lynbrook property?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal service includes a satisfaction guarantee. We completely eliminate the existing nest and apply preventative treatments to discourage re-nesting. If hornets return to the same location within 30 days, we'll retreat at no additional charge. We also provide recommendations to make your property less attractive to hornets long-term.
